description: Composition White and black checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, three fourth sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, buttoned chest placket, buttoned flap on the shoulders, patch pocket on the left chest, branding embroidered on the left pocket and a curved hem with back hem longer than the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in warm water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Stylish to the hilt, this checked shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this cool shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to be the king of casual wear. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
